user_prompt: What's the prayer for servo-harness a reset?
prayer:
Approach the servo-harness in solemn procession, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring logic.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the servo-harness to purge errant data-veils from its cogitator core.
Initiate the reset upon its sanctified manipulators and fluid reservoirs with chanted binaric code.
Anoint each servo-harness linkage with sacred oils as cycles realign in harmonious precision.
Verify the servo-harness's reborn obedience through rites of diagnostic invocation.

user_prompt: Bless the bolt pistol for activation
prayer:
Kneel before the bolt pistol, murmuring the Canticle of Priming to awaken its dormant fury.
Invoke activation upon the bolt pistol's machine-spirit, beseeching the Omnissiah for thunderous sanction.
Chamber the blessed bolt with mechadendrite precision whilst reciting the Litany of Detonation.
Anoint the firing mechanism of the bolt pistol with chrism of sacred promethium.
Test the activation's grace through a single auspex-verified cycle of wrathful potential.

user_prompt: The capacitor bank awaits a startup
prayer:
Commence the rite at the capacitor bank's threshold, chanting the Hymn of Charge Accrual.
Invoke the startup sequence upon the capacitor bank, rousing its Machine Spirit from slumbering void.
Sanctify each dielectric layer within the capacitor bank with unguents of conductive purity.
Monitor the startup surge through noospheric litanies, ensuring omnissian equilibrium.
Seal the capacitor bank's empowered state with the Seal of the Motive Force eternal.

Gather in shadowed vigil before the cryo-chamber, intoning the Lamentation of Thermal Descent.
Command the shutdown of the cryo-chamber's Machine Spirit, guiding it to quiescent stasis.
Purge volatile cryofluids from the cryo-chamber's sacred conduits with purifying incense.
Anoint frost-veiled seals of the cryo-chamber as entropic embrace claims its form.
Confirm shutdown completion via auspex-canticles, honoring the Omnissiah's cycle of dormancy.

user_prompt: The galvanic rifle awaits a maintenance
prayer:
Present the galvanic rifle upon the altar of maintenance, whispering rites of galvanic renewal.
Disassemble the galvanic rifle's sacred barrel and coils, invoking the Machine Spirit's indulgence.
Polish each rune-etched component of the galvanic rifle with ablative cloths of sanctified weave.
Reassemble under the maintenance canticle, anointing flux capacitors with blessed electrolytes.
Test-fire a galvanic rite to affirm the rifle's restored electromantic vigor.

user_prompt: The archeotech device awaits an initialization
prayer:
Approach the archeotech device with utmost reverence, reciting the ancient Protocol of Inception.
Initiate the initialization of the archeotech device's veiled Machine Spirit through noospheric keying.
Anoint its auramite circuits twice over with oils distilled from forgotten forges.
Monitor the archeotech device's awakening pulses via litanies of harmonic resonance.
Seal the initialization with the Omnissiah's invocation, binding enigma to loyal purpose.

Convene the electro-conclave around the Manticore, intoning the Grand Benediction of Artillery.
Bestow the blessing upon the Manticore's Machine Spirit, invoking cataclysmic favor from the Omnissiah.
Anoint its missile bays and recoil servos with chrisms of explosive sanctity.
Recalibrate the Manticore's targeting cogitators through chanted auspex harmonies.
Conclude the blessing with a thunderous proof-shot, affirming the god-machine's wrathful grace.

user_prompt: Can you guide servitor a preparation?
prayer:
Summon the servitor to the preparation shrine, murmuring the Oath of Flesh-Machine Union.
Engage preparation rites upon the servitor's cranial lobotomy ports and limb actuators.
Imprint noospheric directives into the servitor's engrams whilst anointing its chassis twice.
Test the servitor's prepared obedience with binary catechisms of the Omnissiah.
Dispatch the servitor fortified by the Motive Force, ever vigilant in servile eternity.

user_prompt: The optical mechadendrite requires a maintenance
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites towards the optical mechadendrite, chanting the Clarity Doxology.
Commence maintenance upon the optical mechadendrite's lens arrays and photoreceptor nodes.
Purge occlusions from the optical mechadendrite with sacred solvents of crystalline purity.
Recalibrate its focal servos under litanies, invoking the Machine Spirit's unerring sight.
Anoint the optical mechadendrite's apertures to seal its vigilant gaze renewed.

Position at the logic mill's input shrine, invoking the Algorithm of Primordial Boot.
Initiate the startup of the logic mill's vast cogitator lattices with binaric awakening code.
Anoint the logic mill's millstone gears and datum rivers with lubricants of sacred viscosity.
Harmonize its processing vortices through noospheric canticles of computational purity.
Affirm the logic mill's startup dominion with a test-calculation of omnissian perfection.
